# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Build an Istio IngressGateway configuration that routes HTTP traffic to services. Configure Gateway for port 80 without TLS for simplicity. Use HTTP for all ingress traffic since we have a load balancer handling TLS termination upstream. This is for our Istio service mesh ingress.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: demo-ingressgateway
spec:
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway   # this label selects the gateway in IngressGateways list for VirtualServices to route traffic around it. All services are matched by 'istio' tag instead of a specific port number or service name because all ports will be redirected through an Istio Gateway without defining rules on individual ServiceMeshes/ports
  servers:
    - port:
        number: 80   # HTTP Port used for ingress traffic, no TLS termination. Redirecting to specific services (not exposed as a gateway) via istio's routing strategy defined in the selector field below. Use this httpPort instead of explicit service name and version if there are multiple versions/configurations being served up from one single address
      name: demo-http   # Name given for server reference by VirtualService, must be unique within a ServiceMesh (namespace or workload) to uniquely identify the ServerGroup it is part of. It should match this when specifying traffic rules via Gateway's selection rule below in IngressGateways list
      hostname: demo-http   # Hostnames configured for virtual service, must be unique within a ServiceMesh (namespace or workload) to uniquely identify the ServerGroup it is part of. It should match this when specifying traffic rules via Gateway's selection rule below in IngressGateways list
    - port:
        number: 443   # HTTPS Port, used for ingress SSL termination over TLS with a server certificate configured at the VirtualService level (e.g., by using SNI field) to handle multiple virtual hosts on one IP address/hostname scenario within same namespace or between different namespaces
      name: demo-https   # Name given in Server reference, must be unique when selecting services among them for load balancing and routing traffic from IngressGateway (no exposed as a gateway). It should match this if there are multiple versions upstream configured via Gateways' selection rules. Use HTTPS port instead of explicit service name
      hostname: demo-https   # Hostnames associated with ServerGroup, must be unique within namespace and workload so that it can uniquely identify the server/service in traffic routes defined by this gateway rule among a ServiceMesh (namespace or Workload) list. It should match 'hosts' field value when specifying TrafficRules via Gateway selection rules below
